text.title: LLM Cost Basics — Pricing, Usage Tracking, Baseline Optimisation Core Rules

rule.statement: Every LLM call MUST log input_tokens, output_tokens, model_id, feature_id, tenant_id.
rule.rationale: Attribution is impossible without per-call metadata.

rule.statement: Cost calculation MUST use a versioned price table (price changes mid-month).
rule.rationale: Hard-coded prices drift; versioned tables make audit possible.

rule.statement: Response cache MUST be applied to repeat prompts BEFORE advanced techniques.
rule.rationale: Cache pays for itself in week 1; advanced techniques need eng time.

rule.statement: Conversation history MUST be truncated to last-N turns by default (e.g. last 6).
rule.rationale: Unbounded history is the #1 quiet cost driver.

rule.statement: Multi-model setups MUST default to the cheapest model and escalate on confidence-gate failure.
rule.rationale: Defaulting to the expensive model is the #2 quiet cost driver.
